rulings.Case Title: THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D. vs. JONES, TERRI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Seal Records
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 10, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT TERRI Jones' Motion To Seal Records. Defendant's Motion to Seal Records id DENIED. This matter is subject to CCP 1161.2 and access will be restricted. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZEMACH HOLDINGS LLC, VS. ALAN CHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgemnt On The Pleadings Per Ccp 438
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 10, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT ALAN CHAN and SPORTS TREND, INC.'s Motion For Judgemnt On The Pleadings Per Ccp 438. Defendant's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges standing to sue for breach of contract covering lease for premises 8/1/10-9/30/12. Contracts attached to RJN cover other periods. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALSTON CAPITAL-SF MULTIFAMILY IV, LLC VS. GENT STURGEON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 10, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT GENT STURGEON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer pursuant to CCP 1161(4), including landlord-tenant relationship. Complaint also alleges that nuisance existed on April 26, 2013. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C in future. =(501/REQ)
